---
title: "4_PrepModelData"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-06"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
rm(list=ls())
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(MuMIn)
library(car)

options(na.action = "na.fail")
```

# --------------
# Lookup table: standardize naming to demog conventions
# site -> GP/NR/JP, plot -> N-lower etc.
# --------------

```{r lookup}

plot_names_lookup <- data.frame(
  site  = c(rep("GP",6), rep("NR",6), rep("JP",6)),
  plot  = c("N-lower","N-upper","S-lower","S-upper","T-lower","T-upper",
             "N-lower","N-upper","S-lower","S-upper","T-lower","T-upper",
             "N-east","N-west","S-east","S-west","T-east","T-west"),
  site_clim = c(rep("guanella",6), rep("niwot",6), rep("jones",6)),
  pop_clim  = c("NorthLower","NorthUpper","SouthLower","SouthUpper","TopLower","TopUpper",
                "NorthLower","NorthUpper","SouthLower","SouthUpper","TopLower","TopUpper",
                "NorthEast","NorthWest","SouthEast","SouthWest","TopEast","TopWest"),
  site_mt = c(rep("Guanella",6), rep("Niwot",6), rep("Jones",6)),
  pop_mt  = c("LowerNorth","UpperNorth","LowerSouth","UpperSouth","LowerTop","UpperTop",
               "LowerNorth","UpperNorth","LowerSouth","UpperSouth","LowerTop","UpperTop",
               "EastNorth","WestNorth","EastSouth","WestSouth","EastTop","WestTop")
)

```

# --------------
# Load data
# --------------

```{r load}

demog <- readRDS("data/demog/vr_modData/mod_demog_data.rds")

pop_elev <- read_csv("data/pop_info.csv") %>%
  mutate(site = sub("_.*", "", pop), pop_mt = sub("^[^_]+_", "", pop)) %>%
  left_join(plot_names_lookup %>% select(site, plot, pop_mt), by = c("site", "pop_mt")) %>%
  select(site, plot, pop_elev = elev)

microtopo <- read_csv("data/output/model_microtopo.csv") %>%
  left_join(plot_names_lookup %>% select(site_demog = site, plot, site_mt, pop_mt),
            by = c("site" = "site_mt", "pop" = "pop_mt")) %>%
  select(-c(site, pop)) %>%
  rename(site = site_demog) %>%
  left_join(pop_elev, by = c("site", "plot"))

clim <- read_csv("data/climate/for_analyses/clim_summary.csv") %>%
  left_join(plot_names_lookup %>% select(site_demog = site, plot, site_clim, pop_clim),
            by = c("site" = "site_clim", "pop" = "pop_clim")) %>%
  select(-c(site, pop)) %>%
  rename(site = site_demog)

```

# --------------
# Join
# --------------

```{r join}

surv_mod <- demog$surv %>%
  rename(plantID = id) %>% 
  left_join(microtopo, by = c("site", "plot", "plantID")) %>%
  left_join(clim, by = c("site", "plot", "year"))

growth_mod <- demog$growth %>%
  rename(plantID = id) %>% 
  left_join(microtopo, by = c("site", "plot", "plantID")) %>%
  left_join(clim, by = c("site", "plot", "year"))

repro_mod <- demog$repro %>%
  rename(plantID = id) %>% 
  left_join(microtopo, by = c("site", "plot", "plantID")) %>%
  left_join(clim, by = c("site", "plot", "year"))

mod_data <- list(
  surv   = surv_mod,
  growth = growth_mod,
  repro  = repro_mod
)

saveRDS(mod_data, "data/demog/vr_modData/mod_data.rds")

```

# --------------
# Univariate variable exploration
# pseudo-R2 (McFadden) for binomial vrs, R2 for growth
# --------------

```{r var_explore}

clim_vars <- names(clim)[!names(clim) %in% c("site", "plot", "year")]
mt_vars <- names(microtopo)[!names(microtopo) %in% c("site", "plot", plantID)]

vr_list <- list(
  surv     = list(data = surv_mod, response = "surv", family = "binomial"),
  growth   = list(data = growth_mod, response = "growth", family = "gaussian"),
  flowered = list(data = repro_mod, response = "flowered", family = "binomial"),
  n_flrs   = list(data = repro_mod %>% filter(flowered == 1),   response = "total_flrs", family = "poisson")
)

results <- data.frame()

for (v in c(clim_vars, mt_vars)) {
  var_type <- ifelse(v %in% clim_vars, "climate", "microtopo")
  for (vr_name in names(vr_list)) {
    vr   <- vr_list[[vr_name]]
    dat  <- vr$data[, c(vr$response, v)] %>% drop_na()
    if (nrow(dat) < 10 || var(dat[[v]], na.rm = TRUE) == 0) next
    fml  <- as.formula(paste(vr$response, "~", v))
    r2   <- tryCatch({
      if (vr$family == "gaussian") {
        summary(lm(fml, data = dat))$r.squared
      } else {
        m <- glm(fml, data = dat, family = vr$family)
        1 - m$deviance / m$null.deviance
      }
    }, error = function(e) NA_real_)
    results <- rbind(results, data.frame(vr = vr_name, var = v, type = var_type, r2 = r2))
  }
}

```

```{r var_explore_plot, fig.width = 9, fig.height = 6}

results %>%
  filter(!is.na(r2), type == "climate") %>%
  mutate(var = reorder(var, r2, FUN = mean)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = r2, y = var)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, color = "#E07B64") +
  facet_wrap(~vr, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(x = "R² / pseudo-R²", y = NULL,
       title = "Climate variables — univariate variance explained") +
  theme_bw()

results %>%
  filter(!is.na(r2), type == "microtopo") %>%
  mutate(var = reorder(var, r2, FUN = mean)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = r2, y = var)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, color = "#5BADA8") +
  facet_wrap(~vr, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(x = "R² / pseudo-R²", y = NULL,
       title = "Microtopo variables — univariate variance explained") +
  theme_bw()

```

# --------------
# Variable winnowing: VIF then dredge?
# --------------

```{r winnow_setup}
clim_vars <- names(clim)[!names(clim) %in% c("site", "plot", "year")]
mt_vars <- names(microtopo)[!names(microtopo) %in% c("site", "plot", "plantID")]
```

```{r cluster_setup}
library(parallel)
cl <- makeCluster(detectCores() - 1)
clusterEvalQ(cl, {
  library(lme4)
  library(MuMIn)
})
```


```{r surv_clim_dredge}
surv_dat <- surv_mod %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c(mt_vars, clim_vars)), ~ as.numeric(scale(.))), year = factor(year)) %>% 
  select(-log_size) %>% 
  na.omit() %>% 
  mutate(site.pop = paste(site,plot,sep = "."))

surv_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("surv ~ size_t0*(site + year + ", paste(clim_vars,collapse = " + "),") + (1|site.pop)"),collapse = " "))
surv_clim_mod <- glmer(formula = surv_clim_formula,family = "binomial",data=surv_dat)
clusterExport(cl, "surv_dat")
dredge_surv_clim <- dredge(surv_clim_mod, cluster = cl, 
                           fixed = c("size_t0", "year"), trace = 2,
  subset = (ann_snow_days + win_meanT_mean + win_meanT_range + gs_snow_days + gs_meanT_mean + gs_meanT_range) <= 3 &
           !(ann_snow_days & win_meanT_mean) &
           !(ann_snow_days & gs_snow_days))

surv_clim_best_mod <- get.models(surv_clim_dredge,subset=1)[[1]]
surv_clim_vars <- setdiff(rownames(summary(surv_clim_best_mod)$coefficients),c("size_t0","year2024","year2025","(Intercept)"))
```


```{r growth_clim_dredge}
growth_dat <- growth_mod %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c(mt_vars, clim_vars)), ~ as.numeric(scale(.))), 
         year = factor(year)) %>% 
  select(-log_size) %>% 
  na.omit() %>%
  mutate(site.pop = paste(site,plot,sep = "."))

growth_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("growth ~ year + size_t0 + ", paste(clim_vars,collapse = " + ")," + (1|site.pop)"),collapse = " "))
growth_clim_mod <- lmer(formula = growth_clim_formula,data=growth_dat,REML=F)
clusterExport(cl, "growth_dat")
growth_clim_dredge <- dredge(growth_clim_mod, cluster = cl, fixed = c("size_t0", "year"), trace = 2,
  subset = (ann_snow_days + win_meanT_mean + win_meanT_range + gs_snow_days + gs_meanT_mean + gs_meanT_range) <= 3 &
           !(ann_snow_days & win_meanT_mean) &
           !(ann_snow_days & gs_snow_days))
growth_clim_best_mod <- get.models(growth_clim_dredge,subset=1)[[1]]
growth_clim_vars <- setdiff(rownames(summary(growth_clim_best_mod)$coefficients),c("size_t0","year2024","year2025","(Intercept)"))

## Variance in growth
growth_var_dat <- growth_dat %>% 
  mutate(growth_resid.sq = residuals(growth_clim_best_mod)^2)
growth_var_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("growth_resid.sq ~ year + size_t0 + site ", paste(clim_vars,collapse = " + ")," + (1|site.pop)"),collapse = " "))

growth_var_clim_mod <- lmer(growth_var_clim_formula,
                            data = growth_var_dat,
                            REML=FALSE,
                            na.action = na.fail)
clusterExport(cl, "growth_var_dat")
growth_var_clim_dredge <- dredge(growth_var_clim_mod, cluster = cl, fixed = c("size_t0", "year"), trace = 2,
  subset = (ann_snow_days + win_meanT_mean + win_meanT_range + gs_snow_days + gs_meanT_mean + gs_meanT_range) <= 3 &
           !(ann_snow_days & win_meanT_mean) &
           !(ann_snow_days & gs_snow_days))
growth_var_best_mod <- get.models(growth_var_clim_dredge,subset=1)[[1]]
growth_var_clim_vars <- setdiff(rownames(summary(growth_var_best_mod)$coefficients),c("size_t0","year2024","year2025","(Intercept)"))

```

```{r p_repro}
repro_dat  <- repro_mod %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c(mt_vars, clim_vars)), ~ as.numeric(scale(.))), year = factor(year)) %>% 
  select(-log_size) %>% 
  na.omit() %>% 
  mutate(site.pop = paste(site,plot,sep = "."))

repro_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("flowered ~ year + size_t0 + ", paste(clim_vars,collapse = " + ")," + (1|site.pop)"),collapse = " "))
repro_clim_mod <- glmer(repro_clim_formula, data = repro_dat, family = binomial) 
clusterExport(cl, "repro_dat")
repro_clim_dredge <- dredge(repro_clim_mod, cluster = cl, fixed = c("size_t0", "year"), trace = 2,
  subset = (ann_snow_days + win_meanT_mean + win_meanT_range + gs_snow_days + gs_meanT_mean + gs_meanT_range) <= 3 &
           !(ann_snow_days & win_meanT_mean) &
           !(ann_snow_days & gs_snow_days))
repro_clim_best_mod <- get.models(repro_clim_dredge, subset = 1)[[1]]
repro_clim_vars <- setdiff(rownames(summary(repro_clim_best_mod)$coefficients), c("size_t0", "year2024", "year2025", "(Intercept)"))
```


```{r nflrs_clim_dredge}
nflrs_dat <- repro_mod %>% filter(flowered == 1) %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c(mt_vars, clim_vars)), ~ as.numeric(scale(.))), year = factor(year)) %>%
  select(-log_size) %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  mutate(site.pop = paste(site, plot, sep = "."))

nflrs_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("total_flrs ~ year + size_t0 + ", paste(clim_vars, collapse = " + "), " + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
nflrs_clim_mod <- glmer(nflrs_clim_formula, data = nflrs_dat, family = poisson)
clusterExport(cl, "nflrs_dat")
nflrs_clim_dredge <- dredge(nflrs_clim_mod, cluster = cl, fixed = c("size_t0", "year"), trace = 2,
  subset = (ann_snow_days + win_meanT_mean + win_meanT_range + gs_snow_days + gs_meanT_mean + gs_meanT_range) <= 3 &
           !(ann_snow_days & win_meanT_mean) &
           !(ann_snow_days & gs_snow_days))
nflrs_clim_best_mod <- get.models(nflrs_clim_dredge, subset = 1)[[1]]
nflrs_clim_vars <- setdiff(rownames(summary(nflrs_clim_best_mod)$coefficients), c("size_t0", "year2024", "year2025", "(Intercept)"))
```

```{r cluster_stop}
stopCluster(cl)
```
